questions.question: The Tailwind foundation is in and the app is intact. How should the component restyle pass proceed?

options.label: Incremental, component-by-component
options.description: Land the foundation now; convert components to utilities in small reviewable PRs (and opportunistically as we touch them — e.g. Message/Markdown during the Streamdown work). Lowest risk, keeps each diff readable.

options.label: Full restyle now, one pass
options.description: I convert the whole renderer (styles.css + all .module.css → utilities) in one large change now. Idiomatic end state fastest, but a big diff and higher regression risk to eyeball.

options.label: Foundation only — stop here
options.description: Treat the foundation (preflight + tokens + utilities available) as the deliverable for this work item; defer all restyling. New UI uses Tailwind; old CSS stays until touched.
